sourceFileBeforeCorrection.status: INVALID — masterTemplate reference mutated while declared version and filename remained 1

findings.note: 0.3.0-pilot's release-manifest.json pinned TEMPLATE_COMBINATION/TEN_K__4D__INTERMEDIATE version=1 with hash e976d10e... — different from the hash (c6324371a3...) pinned by every earlier release for the same (documentType, key, version) tuple. This is the defect.

correction.v2ContentHash: b3dab01388bfac1de820efa3649007e1bf3cfa1d4980e4070cd9cbacd15e8594 — deterministic, stable across source, bundle assembly, and every release (0.4.0-pilot); verified in artifacts/audits/combination-v2-hash-and-closure-audit.md. Differs from v1's hash because the content differs (masterTemplate.version 1 vs 2), not because of any per-release variability.

0.3.0-pilot.handling: Preserved unchanged (immutable release directory not rewritten); superseded via release-status ledger; a corrected pilot release created

outcomeCRationale: 0.3.0-pilot incorrectly pinned combination v1 with changed content (a mislabeled published artifact). 0.3.0-pilot's directory was preserved unchanged; a new pilot release was created pinning the correctly-versioned combination v2; 0.3.0-pilot was marked SUPERSEDED in the release-status ledger only after the corrected release verified.
filesChanged: src/PlanCatalog.Core/Audit/PilotDomainContentAudit.cs (wording correction, AUD-007 rationale rewritten, new AUD-055)
tests/PlanCatalog.Tests/Golden/TaperPhaseFamilyEligibilityTests.cs (split single-combination test into v1/v2-aware tests, added hash tests)
finalImmutabilityStatus: RESOLVED — v1 restored to historically pinned content; v2 created as a distinct versioned artifact; no historical release directory rewritten; 0.3.0-pilot preserved and superseded via ledger only.
